title: SPECIAL EDUCATION - 211info
text: SOUTHERN OREGON EDUCATION SERVICE DISTRICT SPECIAL EDUCATION Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides evaluative, consultative, and direct special education services to students with disabilities, including assistive technology, audiological, autism, deaf and hard of hearing, long-term care and treatment, visual, psychological, orthopedic, speech and language, and STEPS (students with severe and/or multiple disabilities). Also provides evaluation and special education services to children from birth to years. 101 N Grape Street Medford, OR 97501 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Friday 7:30am-4:30pm Email (541) 776-8590 3110 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 776-8590 ext 3110 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Walk in, call, or visit website for more information FEES: Varies by service DOCUMENTS: None required at intake AREA SERVED: Jackson, Josephine, and Klamath Counties SITE HOURS: Monday-Friday 7:30am-4:30pm Services: Special Education Plan Development Student Disability Services Transition Services for Students with Disabilities Other Services Offered At This Location: EDUCATIONAL INSTITUTIONS/SCHOOLS - EDUCATION SERVICE DISTRICT EDUCATIONAL PROGRAMS - MIGRANT EDUCATION PROGRAM EDUCATIONAL SUPPORT SERVICES - HOME SCHOOLING If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. SOUTHERN OREGON EDUCATION SERVICE DISTRICT
